message:
refactor(vdbe): hoist shared borrow out of MakeRecord if/else branches

In the OP_MakeRecord handler (engine.rs:~5048), `let this = &*self;`
was identically duplicated inside both the `if let P4::Affinity(aff)`
branch (which filters out IPK 'X' columns) and the `else` branch
(which iterates all n_cols registers). Since both branches need the
same shared borrow for the closure's `move` capture, hoist the binding
above the conditional so it is defined once and used by whichever
branch executes.

No behavioral change — purely a DRY cleanup of a duplicated binding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
